name: @clusterio/plugin-mock-external-web
description: Manual reproduction fixture for PR #922. A web-enabled external plugin that DELIBERATELY requests conflicting react (^17) and webpack (^4). When added to the workspace as an ordinary in-repo member (NO injected:true), the root pnpm.overrides collapse it to the single workspace react@18 / webpack@5 and the --dev-plugin web build compiles clean. See README.md.
